ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., global, international, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the emission data belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "emission_1990" REAL /* Emission amount in 1990 */,
  "emission_2005" REAL /* Emission amount in 2005 */,
  "emission_2017" REAL /* Emission amount in 2017 */,
  "world_2017_percent" REAL /* Percentage of world emissions in 2017 */,
  "growth_1990_2017" REAL /* Growth rate from 1990 to 2017 */,
  "region_2017_percent" REAL /* Percentage of region emissions in 2017 */,
  "per_capita_2017" REAL /* Per capita emissions in 2017 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission dataset */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate from 1990 to 2017 */,
  "growth_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of growth rate (e.g., linear, exponential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "per_capita_emissions" (
  "capita_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each per capita emission record */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission data */,
  "per_capita_emission" REAL /* Per capita emission for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capita_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_per_capita_emissions_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_emissions" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total emission record */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission data */,
  "total_emission_inc_lucf" REAL /* Total emission including LULUCF */,
  "total_emission_ex_lucf" REAL /* Total emission excluding LULUCF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_emissions_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Metadata key */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
